description: Every Alex Jones Live show from the first month of its operation in April 2008. Scroll to the bottom of the page for downloads. Mirror playlist for all videos: http://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLBBB404135CFB23F9 Listed in reverse chronological order. Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Wednesday, April 30th, 2008 Alex Jones welcomes Richard C. Cook. to discuss the real shape of the economy and how the Globalists have bankrupted the U.S. by means of a careful plan that has unfolded for the last 100 years. Cook left NASA to become an analyst with the U.S. Treasury Department in 1986. There he developed and taught training courses on policy analysis and led project teams on financial policy and organizational restructuring. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kNHnx-BjCVQ Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Tuesday, April 29th, 2008 Alex Jones is joined by legendary conspiracy author and lecturer G. Edward Griffin to discuss the banking system, the credit crunch and the collapse of the dollar and U.S. sovereignty. Griffin lucidly explains how we need to re-assert our own power to fight the corrupt institutions of power that have taken control over our lives in this fascinating in-depth interview which offers real answers and solutions. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o9yH9sBn39Y Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Monday, April 28th, 2008 Alex welcomes author Steve Quayle to discuss the emerging prison planet, including information from Steve's sources concerning the influence of former Stasi chief Markus Wolf and former head of the KGB General Yevgeni Primakov in setting up Homeland Security and developing future systems of control for the U.S. government. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DjjK4TRFqrg Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Friday, April 25th, 2008 Alex is joined by revisionist historian Michael Hoffman to discuss the history of the New World Order, which different groups are jockeying for power within the global control system, the history and true characteristic of slavery and how he sees the future of the planet. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g379a1IYgD4 Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Thursday, April 24th, 2008 Jason Bermas from the Loose Change crew fills in for Alex and welcomes Justin Martell of Student Scholars For 9/11 Truth. Gary Talis, subject of a frame-up and a subsequent media smear campaign after he was attacked by a Neo-Con at a Laura Bush event in New York also joins Jason to talk about what really happened. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ga9CWj0GOj8 Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Wednesday, April 23rd, 2008 Alex is joined by host of "Frontline Texas" Richard Reeves to discuss the efforts to win a brokered convention for Congressman Ron Paul, why the fight is only just beginning despite the fact that some have given up, the issue of a third party run and more. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2AIfbhjSqss Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Tuesday, April 22nd, 2008 In this video, Alex goes on a news bliz and covers all the latest issues, including attempts to link the 9/11 Truth Movement with terrorists, Al-CIAda's sock puppet Al-Zawahiri saying questioning the official 9/11 story is Iranian propaganda, the real agenda behind the global food shortage and more. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-bdZGoqARiU Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Monday, April 21st, 2008 In this video, Alex discusses how We Are Change Ireland were assaulted by an MEP but then subject to a smear campaign on behalf of the media who framed them for the assault. Genesis radio host George Butler joins Alex in-studio to talk about Obama and Hillary. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gMon_OYaJGk Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Friday, April 18th, 2008 In this show, Alex welcomes award winning writer and filmmaker William Lewis to talk about his latest documentary - Washington, You're Fired - and discuss the latest police state news. Also we meet Alex's hilarious new incarnation - Officer Jack Boot. An 8 minute clip from Lews' film is premiered at the end of the show. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gJ2XgbBpz6M Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Thursday, April 17th, 2008 In this video, Alex is joined in studio by Jason Bermas of Loose Change to discuss how he woke up, the future plans of the Loose Change crew and a myriad of news items. Alex also adds a little humor to proceedings by introducing his new hilarious "thug life" You Tube video hit. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NZcgJF6zTB0 Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Wednesday, April 16th, 2008 In this video, Alex takes calls on a plethora of different topics, including tactics on confronting globalists a la We Are Change, taxes and the Federal Reserve, mind control and a whole host more. The scary Al-Qaeda monster also makes a second appearance! Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ecR9uECwxyc Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Tuesday, April 15th, 2008 In this video, Alex is joined by Raymond Teauge to talk about the NASA Apollo missions and ex-German Defense Minister Andreas von Buelow to discuss 9/11. Alex then takes on a Neo-Con's call to discard the Constitution in a disgusting Austin Un-American Statesman piece. Part 2 Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fUh6Y-ai_1A Show Aired: Tuesday, April 15th, 2008 Alex Jones - Live In this video, Alex is joined by Raymond Teauge to talk about the NASA Apollo missions and ex-German Defense Minister Andreas von Buelow to discuss 9/11. Alex then takes on a Neo-Con's call to discard the Constitution in a disgusting Austin Un-American Statesman piece. Part 1 Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7btkz3KA3kw Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Monday, April 14th, 2008 In this video, Alex is joined by Kurt Nimmo and Austin city council representative, and author/documentary film maker George Humphrey to discuss the real agenda behind the credit crunch, the possibility of war with Iran, the Israeli lobby and what the New World Order's long term goals are. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d0bMkxEGk-c Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Friday, April 11th, 2008 In this video, Alex is joined by Bob Chapman from the International Forecaster to discuss the fiscal apocalypse, the real agenda behind the credit crunch, gold and silver shortages, and how he sees the future of the economy panning out. Alex also takes lots of calls. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yRh-t1rsbRg Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Thursday, April 10th, 2008 In this video feature, Alex begins by taking calls on the topics of the day before the broadcast switches to a 15 minute segment from Alex's public access TV show. The last 20 minutes of the show offer a sneak peek into Alex's upcoming movie about the JFK assassination, including interviews with Jim Marrs and St. John Hunt. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TGakGcnN_6c Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Wednesday, April 9th, 2008 In this 90 minute video, Alex welcomes guest Kevin Booth, producer of American Drug War, to discuss the failed drug war, the real dangers of legal pharmaceutical drugs, the run-for-profit prison-industrial complex, Kevin and Alex's personal experiences with drugs and more. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TPzWTNS9GIc Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Tuesday, April 8th, 2008 In this 3-hour plus video marathon, Alex takes on the 9/11 no-plane crowd in a forceful and hilarious way! Alex also covers an Israeli Rabbi's genocidal comments towards Arabs. Hour 2 is simulcast with British radio as Alex is interviewed. Hour 3 Alex takes lots of calls. Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I62fGg3qW-g Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Monday, April 7th, 2008 On this maiden voyage for The Alex Jones Show Live, Alex goes a full hour to discuss the Illuminati with expert Alan Watt and takes calls. Part 2 Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y14eUTm0QEE Alex Jones - Live Show Aired: Monday, April 7th, 2008 On this maiden voyage for The Alex Jones Show Live, Alex goes a full hour to discuss the Illuminati with expert Alan Watt and takes calls. Part 1 Mirror: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eZSGzozCX9g
